name: Sausage Brunch Casserole
recipeInstructions:
Prepare Evening Before. Cook sausage and drain thoroughly on paper towels.
Beat the eggs and evaporated milk slightly.
Add sausage, cubed bread, and cheddar cheese.
Pour into 9 x 9-inch casserole.
Cover with foil.
Refrigerate overnight.
Bake uncovered for 45 minutes or until firm in a preheated 350 degree oven.
Onions, green peppers, and mushrooms can also be added.
